message.content:
@startuml
actor ユーザ as user1
boundary ブラウザ as browser1
control web.php as wp1
participant Kouka1_1Controller as klc1
entity "Kouka1_1.index.blade.php" as kbip1
entity layout.kouka1_1.blade.php as lkbp1
component components.menu.blade.php as cmbp1
database components.subview.blade.php as csbp1

activate user1 
user1 -> browser1 : 該当ページをリクエスト[/koukal_1]
browser1 -->wp1: GET[/koukal_1]
deactivate user1 

activate browser1  
browser1->klc1:@index
klc1-->kbip1:
kbip1-->>lkbp1:@extends
lkbp1<--cmbp1:@component
cmbp1<<-csbp1:@include


@enduml
